macro.title: Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport impacted by ground stop due to low visibility - ABC15 Arizona
macro.summary: A ground stop was in effect, impacting Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport flights on Sunday morning.

macro.title: In its third flight, a Blue Origin New Glenn rocket puts satellite payload into wrong orbit - CBS News
macro.summary: The launching appeared to go off without a hitch, but a problem prevented the rocket's upper stage from putting its payload into the correct orbit.

macro.title: Scoop: NSA using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist - Axios
macro.summary: The government's cybersecurity needs are outweighing the Pentagon's feud with Anthropic.

macro.title: AST SpaceMobile Addresses Today’s Orbital Launch of BlueBird 7 on the New Glenn Launch Vehicle - Business Wire
Tesla’s ‘Robotaxi’ expansion looks like another stock pump before earnings - Electrek
macro.summary: Tesla launched 'Robotaxi' in Dallas and Houston with virtually zero availability — just days before Q1 earnings. Data shows the same pre-earnings pattern as January.
